rows.schemaSignal: mcp_servers tables; detected Codex version is evidence, not a schema version
rows.precedence: trusted project .codex/config.toml may add/override user configuration; exact conflict semantics are version-sensitive
rows.reload: IDE MCP workflow requires extension restart; CLI should start a new session after direct edits
unknowns: project conflict behavior must be tested before writes

rows.discoveryRule: $HOME/.agents/skills/*/SKILL.md for user scope; repository/admin/system sources are outside AMS writes
rows.precedence: same-name skills are not merged and can both appear; no winner should be invented
rows.reload: automatic detection; restart Codex if the update is not visible
unknowns: selector behavior for duplicate names is not a deterministic precedence contract

rows.precedence: global first; project root to CWD appended later; override filename wins within one directory
rows.reload: instruction chain is rebuilt once per run/session; restart or start a new command

rows.schemaSignal: mcpServers object; no file-level schema version
rows.precedence: agent > workspace > global for CLI; workspace > global for IDE
rows.reload: IDE applies on save and reconnects; CLI file watcher reconciles without restarting
unknowns: IDE agent-specific precedence is not claimed by the user-level adapter

rows.precedence: workspace skill wins over same-name global skill
rows.reload: discovered when a chat starts; imported IDE skills are available immediately; start a new CLI chat when stale
unknowns: custom CLI agents require explicit skill resources

rows.schemaSignal: inclusion frontmatter: always, fileMatch, manual, or auto; AGENTS.md is always included
rows.precedence: workspace steering wins over conflicting global steering
rows.reload: IDE files become immediately available; CLI reads steering automatically in chat
unknowns: conflict resolution among multiple files in one scope is not documented as a stable order

rows.schemaSignal: top-level mcp object; detected client version is evidence
rows.precedence: project .kilo/kilo.jsonc or project kilo.jsonc takes precedence over global
rows.reload: changes are observed by the shared CLI server; reconnect/reload when the client does not refresh
unknowns: kilo.json fallback preference when both global extensions exist is not documented

rows.precedence: project .kilo/skills wins over same-name global skill; compatibility/additional path tie order is unknown
unknowns: tie behavior across compatibility and additional paths

rows.discoveryRule: instructions array in $HOME/.config/kilo/kilo.jsonc points to user-authored Markdown paths/globs
rows.precedence: global instructions load before project instructions; project conflicts win; array order then filesystem order for globs
rows.reload: rules apply on the next interaction
unknowns: missing referenced files are adapter warnings; client error severity is not specified

rows.schemaSignal: mcpServers object; no file-level schema version
rows.reload: /mcp reload or restart/new session after direct edits
unknowns: surface is absent on the reviewed host

rows.precedence: project/inherited sources precede personal, plugin, built-in, and remote sources as documented by the CLI
rows.reload: start/restart a session; /env verifies loaded skills
unknowns: surface is absent on the reviewed host

rows.precedence: personal files apply globally; repository instruction sources are also loaded and conflicts are not guaranteed deterministic
rows.reload: exit and resume or start a new session
unknowns: surface is absent on the reviewed host

rows.discoveryRule: VS Code command MCP: Open User Configuration resolves the active profile mcp.json; default-profile candidate is $APPDATA/Code/User/mcp.json
rows.schemaSignal: servers object plus VS Code MCP schema
rows.precedence: profile and workspace sources coexist; official page does not state a deterministic same-name winner
rows.reload: configuration changes restart affected servers; auto-start is optional/experimental
unknowns: GitHub Copilot extension is absent on the reviewed host

rows.schemaSignal: Agent Skills frontmatter; name must match parent directory
rows.precedence: project and personal locations are discoverable; official page does not define a same-name winner
rows.reload: Configure Skills/agent customization refresh; restart extension host if stale
unknowns: GitHub Copilot extension is absent on the reviewed host

rows.discoveryRule: user-profile *.instructions.md discovered through Chat: Configure Instructions; physical profile path is resolved by VS Code, not guessed
rows.schemaSignal: applyTo glob or task description; profile source metadata
rows.precedence: personal > repository > organization; multiple files within one category have no guaranteed order
rows.reload: next chat request; diagnostics verifies loaded files
unknowns: physical path varies by active profile
GitHub Copilot extension is absent on the reviewed host
